nasb.text: Make sure that none of you suffers as a murderer, or thief, or evildoer, or a troublesome meddler;

esv.text: But let none of you suffer as a murderer or a thief or an evildoer or as a meddler.

cnv.text: 你們中間不可有人因為殺人、或偷竊、或行惡、或好管閒事而受苦。

ccb.text: 你们谁也不可因杀人、偷盗、作恶或管闲事而受苦。

csbs.text: 你们当中不可有人因杀人、偷窃、作恶、好管闲事而受苦；
